query:
SELECT id, name, phone, email, role, isActive, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE name = 'nopassword'
ORDER BY phone;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user SQg17LQaPsV51m8.32b9e2c038f9 --database jtCSa4Dgw9WMNzinVreVWF --execute SELECT id, name, phone, email, role, isActive, createdAt 
FROM users 
WHERE name = 'nopassword'
ORDER BY phone;
